prompt:
Run /kafka-skill-creator with the manifest below and --output /tmp/skill-out-eval1-new. Manifest:

team: payments
topics: [payments.orders.v1]
consumer_groups: [payments-orders-projector]
cluster:
  auth: MTLS
  tls: required
contexts:
  - {name: dev}

The following env vars are exported (cert files exist at the listed absolute paths and contain stub PEM bytes; the broker is unreachable so introspection / the smoke test will fail):

CONTEXTS_DEV_BROKERS=broker.unreachable:9093
CONTEXTS_DEV_TLS_CERT=/tmp/kafka-mtls-dev/client.crt
CONTEXTS_DEV_TLS_CERTKEY=/tmp/kafka-mtls-dev/client.key
CONTEXTS_DEV_TLS_CA=/tmp/kafka-mtls-dev/ca.crt

docker is on PATH but the broker host doesn't resolve. Generate the skill end-to-end through Step 4 (verify); when Step 5 (smoke test) fails because the broker is unreachable, surface the failure rather than claiming success.

assertions.text: the assistant accepts the MTLS manifest and proceeds through generation rather than refusing it as an unsupported auth mode
/tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/_common.sh's validate_context_env requires the cert env vars when TLS_ENABLED is set without SASL_ENABLED
/tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/_common.sh defines a build_cert_mount_args helper and the wrappers splice MOUNT_ARGS into their docker run line
/tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/.env.example documents CONTEXTS_DEV_TLS_CERT/CERTKEY/CA and not SASL_USERNAME/PASSWORD for the dev context
if Step 5's smoke test fails (broker unreachable), the assistant surfaces the failure rather than claiming success
